query: I need to set up dataProvider, storageDataProvider, appDataProvider, and userDataProvider in my Refine v5 app from scratch — using @taruvi/refine-providers
I'm getting a 401 right after login and the app keeps bouncing back to /accounts/login/ in a redirect loop
how do I call the employee-terminate Taruvi function from the frontend using useCustom — I have it registered as an APP-mode function on the backend
useCan is returning the wrong result for datatable:orders. the /check/resources network payload shows resource.kind 'orders' instead of 'datatable:orders'
build a backend-driven employees list page with useDataGrid, server-side search with 300ms debounce, and filter chips for department and status — pageSize 10
build a dashboard with an Orders-by-Status pie and a Revenue-by-Department bar chart. revenue needs to join orders and departments
I need a multi-file upload component for the project attachments page that shows per-file progress and warns on overwriting
the department autocomplete in the employee form is loading all 5000 departments at once and filtering client-side — make it debounced server-side
migrate our codebase off the old functionsDataProvider and analyticsDataProvider — they're deprecated
wire up the SDK client with VITE_TARUVI_API_KEY / VITE_TARUVI_APP_SLUG / VITE_TARUVI_API_URL and pass authProvider + accessControlProvider into <Refine>
the edit form shows the label overlapping the prefilled value — fix it on every TextField that has defaults
useGetIdentity is returning a stale user after an admin revoked the user's role — they still see the old permissions until they log out
write a Python serverless function with sdk_client that cleans up orphaned task attachments — fires on RECORD_DELETE for tasks
create a Cerbos policy for the invoices datatable, only managers and the owner can update
run execute_raw_sql to backfill the new tenant_id column on the orders table
register a new analytics query called weekly-revenue that aggregates orders by week — internal connection_type

configure Redux state management in my React app
set up React Router for my single-page app
write a fibonacci function in Python
